## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Testing

- [ ] `pytest`
- [ ] Package build + `twine check`, if packaging or release metadata changed
- [ ] `mkdocs build --strict`, if docs or onboarding changed
- [ ] Docker build
- [ ] Live XRPL Testnet flow, if relevant

## Checklist

- [ ] README updated if behavior or setup changed
- [ ] New config documented
- [ ] Security-sensitive behavior reviewed
